meaning: adj.<主英>电视的,适于拍摄电视的
examples: Above all, he was the first great televisual entertainer.
The key technology which affect the TV news communication consist of cable televisual technology, satellite technology, computer technology and digital technology.
And this latest work by the prolific and increasingly televisual Columbia University professor is no counterexample.
More seriously, perhaps, the governmental arbitor of televisual taste - the Audiovisual Council, is to discuss Loft Story at its meeting on Wednesday.
He is the Cheshire cat whose grin never fades, a brilliant televisual politician whose ready wit unerringly turns his opponents' strength against them.
